entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species whose landraces were studied for genetic variability

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country from which 40 sorghum landraces were collected

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: The country from which two sorghum landraces were collected

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on physical characteristics used to study genetic variability and agronomic traits

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on DNA sequences used to study genetic variability

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEATS (SSRS)
entities.description: A specific type of molecular marker used to determine genetic relationships

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference among the sorghum landraces

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic trait showing positive correlation with inflorescence width

entities.name: INFLORESCENCE WIDTH
entities.description: An agronomic trait positively correlated with yield

entities.name: PANICLES AVERAGES
entities.description: An agronomic trait positively correlated with plot yields

entities.name: PLOT YIELDS
entities.description: An agronomic trait positively correlated with panicles averages

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: An agronomic trait positively correlated with inflorescence length

entities.name: INFLORESCENCE LENGTH
entities.description: An agronomic trait positively correlated with leaf senescence and negatively correlated with tiller numbers

entities.name: TILLER NUMBERS
entities.description: An agronomic trait negatively correlated with inflorescence length

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENTS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to account for the total variability in the data

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to group landraces into distinct clusters based on markers

entities.name: XGAP84
entities.description: A molecular marker exhibiting a high number of alleles

entities.name: XTXP320
entities.description: A molecular marker exhibiting a high number of alleles

entities.name: GENETIC RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The ancestral or genetic connections among the sorghum landraces

entities.name: GENOTYPE SPECIFIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers that are unique to a specific genotype
